summary: Led the design and rollout of a unified HR operating model across 5 countries.
details: Defined process blueprints for recruitment, onboarding, performance management, and workforce planning. Partnered with HR leads in 5 regions to harmonize policies while respecting local labor regulations.

summary: Supported a Web3 scale-up to double headcount while maintaining a 94% retention rate.
details: Introduced competency frameworks, leveling guides, and compensation bands for core protocol, devrel, and product teams. Implemented a streamlined hiring funnel with clear quality-of-hire metrics.

summary: Designed and launched a people analytics suite covering hiring, retention, and engagement.
details: Partnered with HR leadership to define KPIs, built reporting layers on existing HRIS and ATS data, and trained HRBPs on insight-led decision making.
